differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., MALT lymphoma or diffuse large B-cell lymphoma)
Systemic inflammatory disease (e.g., sarcoidosis or vasculitis)
next_steps: Pleural fluid flow cytometry and immunophenotyping
Pleural fluid cytology and cell block for immunohistochemistry
Contrast-enhanced CT scan of the chest and abdomen
Tuberculosis testing (QuantiFERON-TB Gold or pleural fluid AFB culture)
PET-CT imaging to identify potential primary lesion or lymphadenopathy

differential_diagnoses: Plasma-cell neoplasm (e.g., pleural plasmacytoma or multiple myeloma)
next_steps: Pleural fluid immunohistochemistry (cell block) to characterize unclassified cells
Pleural fluid flow cytometry for clonality and surface marker analysis
Serum protein electrophoresis (SPEP) and serum immunofixation
Measurement of pleural fluid adenosine deaminase (ADA) levels
Contrast-enhanced CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis for staging
Pleural biopsy if fluid cytology/flow cytometry is nondiagnostic
